parameters: "To ascend one shall pay the price with blood for the Head,
"There is a big boulder blocking the way"
"We need to find a way to break it"
Do you want to break the Boulder?
"The fire tree is extremely hot, better not to touch them"
Do you want to remove the tree?
"There is lava bursting from the floor blocking the way"
"To find a way cool it down and stop it from coming out"
"Do you want to pump it with water?"
"You spot a hole. Do you want to stick your hand in?"
"Something pinches your hand and drains some of your blood."
